framework.name: Shadow AI Prevalence
framework.description: Widespread unsanctioned use of tools like ChatGPT ('shadow AI') alongside ongoing inability to measure AI's impact on productivity and profit.
framework.raw_quote: The report also highlights the widespread use of 'shadow AI'—unsanctioned tools like ChatGPT.

source.title: MIT report: 95% of generative AI pilots at companies are failing - Fortune
